---
title: "Christopher Chizinski"
subtitle: "Human Dimensions of Wildlife & Fisheries"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: assets/images/Chizinski.jpeg
  image-shape: rounded
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/chrischizinski
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Lab (UNL)
      href: https://humandimensions.unl.edu
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:cchizinski2@unl.edu
---

I am an Associate Professor in the School of Natural Resources at the
University of Nebraska–Lincoln, studying the **human dimensions of wildlife
and fisheries** — how and why people hunt, fish, and forage, and what that
means for management.

My work blends survey science, quantitative ecology, and reproducible
research in R. This site holds my [blog](blog.qmd) (mostly R notes),
[projects](projects.qmd) and software, and my [CV](cv.qmd). For lab members,
current research, and openings, see
[humandimensions.unl.edu](https://humandimensions.unl.edu).
